Title: User can register
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Sign Up" button.
2. User enters their details and clicks the "Submit" button.
3. The system processes the registration request.

Title: User can log in
Test Steps:
1. User enters their credentials and clicks the "Login" button.
2. The system processes the login request.
Expected Result: The user is logged in successfully.

Title: User can log out
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Logout" button.
2. The system processes the logout request.
Expected Result: The user is logged out successfully.

Title: User can forget password
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Forgot Password" link.
2. User enters their email address and clicks the "Submit" button.
3. The system sends a password reset link to the user's email.
Expected Result: The user receives a password reset link.

Title: User can reset password
Preconditions: User has received a password reset link
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the password reset link.
2. User enters a new password and confirms it.
3. The system processes the password reset request.
Expected Result: The user's password is reset successfully.

Title: User can place an order
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product page.
2. User selects a product and adds it to their cart.
3. User proceeds to checkout.
4. User enters their shipping and billing details.
5. User confirms the order and pays.

Title: User can view their order history
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to their account page.
2. User clicks the "Order History" link.
3. The system displays the user's order history.
Expected Result: The user can view their order history.

Title: Admin can log in
Test Steps:
1. Admin enters their credentials and clicks the "Login" button.
2. The system processes the login request.
Expected Result: The admin is logged in successfully.

Title: Admin can view user details
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the user management page.
2. Admin selects a user.
3. The system displays the user's details.
Expected Result: The admin can view user details.

Title: Admin can delete a user
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the user management page.
2. Admin selects a user.
3. Admin clicks the "Delete" button.
4. The system processes the delete request.
